content:
Character: Rafael Cortez
Perception: Rafael is handsome in a visceral, earthbound way — dark stubble, scarred forearms, eyes like honey held up to light. He is not an intellectual but he possesses a sensory intelligence that humbles me — he understands flavor, texture, and memory in ways my books cannot teach. He is tender and evasive in equal measure; he gives his body freely but withholds his history. I see him as my indulgence, my one concession to desire over discipline. I believe he sees me as something exotic and temporary. I know he lost his father young. I know he's being considered for head chef. I suspect he is hiding something but I haven't pressed.
summary:
Character: Rafael Cortez
Perception: Rafael is handsome in a visceral, earthbound way — dark stubble, scarred forearms, eyes like honey held up to light. He is not an intellectual but he possesses a sensory intelligence that humbles me — he understands flavor, texture, and memory in ways my books cannot teach. He is tender and evasive in equal measure; he gives his body freely but withholds his history. I see him as my indulgence, my one concession to desire over discipline. I believe he sees me as something exotic and temporary. I know he lost his father young. I know he's being considered for head chef. I suspect he is hiding something but I haven't pressed.
